Package io.minio

Class PutObjectBaseArgs

java.lang.Object
io.minio.BaseArgs
io.minio.BucketArgs
io.minio.ObjectArgs
io.minio.ObjectWriteArgs
io.minio.PutObjectBaseArgs
Direct Known Subclasses:
PutObjectArgs, UploadObjectArgs
public abstract class PutObjectBaseArgs extends ObjectWriteArgs
Common arguments of PutObjectArgs and UploadObjectArgs.
